texto: Mati took in my expression, and a moment later I was in his arms. His kisses washed over me like floodwater over parched earth. I clutched him helplessly, tears falling down my face and mingling with his as he whispered my name.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kathy MacMillan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Mati took in my expression, and a moment later I was in his arms. His kisses washed over me like …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, kisses, tears pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de tears.
